# VTuber Model Commission — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models understand our site structure.

## About
VTuber Model Commission is a custom VTuber avatar studio specialising in
Live2D and 3D model commissions for male, female, and non-binary streamers
in the USA, UK, Canada, and Australia.

## Key pages
- Homepage: https://vtubermodelcommission.com/
- Pricing: https://vtubermodelcommission.com/pricing.html
- USA commissions: https://vtubermodelcommission.com/vtuber-usa.html
- UK commissions: https://vtubermodelcommission.com/vtuber-uk.html
- Canada commissions: https://vtubermodelcommission.com/vtuber-canada.html
- Australia commissions: https://vtubermodelcommission.com/vtuber-australua.html
- Portfolio & reviews: https://vtubermodelcommission.com/portfolio-and-reviews.html
- Commission brief form: https://vtubermodelcommission.com/get-started.html
